title: Administration
description: The Administration module provides tools for managing users, roles, permissions, authentication providers, system configuration, and platform health. Administrators can configure AI providers, monitor system status, manage vocabulary settings, and review audit logs to maintain governance and compliance across the Parthenon platform.
tips: Use the Roles & Permissions panel to apply least-privilege access, granting users only the capabilities required for their research role.
Review the Audit Log regularly to track data access and configuration changes for regulatory compliance.
Configure Authentication Providers under Administration before onboarding new users to ensure SSO or LDAP integrations are in place.
Check System Health and the Solr Administration panel after platform upgrades to confirm all services are running correctly.
Use the WebAPI Registry to register and manage external data source connections centrally.
